---
name: Sprint Planning
description: Define a new sprint
title: "Sprint XXX: [Theme]"
labels: ["sprint", "planning"]
assignees: []
---

## Sprint Goal

One sentence: What founder problem does this sprint solve?

## Success Metric

How do we know this sprint succeeded? (e.g., "Founder can connect Instagram and ask 'Which posts drove sales?' and get a chart + insight in <15s")

## Scope

### In Scope

- [ ] Item 1
- [ ] Item 2

### Out of Scope

- [ ] Item 1
- [ ] Item 2

## Definition of Done

- [ ] All code type-checks (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] All packages build (`pnpm build`)
- [ ] Manual E2E test passed (workspace create → connect → chat → chart)
- [ ] ADRs written for any new decisions
- [ ] DECISIONS.md updated
- [ ] Documentation updated (spec.md, relevant RFCs)
- [ ] Sprint review written (operations/SPRINT_XXX_REVIEW.md)

## ADRs Needed

List any ADRs that must be written/updated in this sprint:

- ADR-XXX: [Title]

## Dependencies

- Blocked by: [Issue # or external dependency]
- Blocks: [Issue #]

## Team Assignments

- @handle: Area 1
- @handle: Area 2
